violations.text: Establishment did not have an employee that has successfully completed an approved food safety manager course. Per employee, she is in the process of completing the course and just needs to take the test. Please email proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and black debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Walk-in freezer door gaskets, located across from the ice machine, were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The floors in the walk-in coolers and freezers are constructed of a material which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2026

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information (sub ingredients). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food was relocated behind the counter during time of inspection. Per person in charge, labels will be corrected. Please email inspector proof of correction before food is sold as a self-service product on the shelf. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Establishment did not have an employee that has successfully completed an approved food safety manager course at time of inspection. Establishment must have an on-site employee certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must enroll additional employees in an approved food safety manger course. Please email inspector proof of completion of course. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (rolling pin) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Medicine was observed stored on the same shelf as food. Medicine was relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food was relocated behind the counter at time of inspection. Establishment must make new labels for food or food must remain behind the counter. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the perimeter of the upstairs kitchen and basement floors and on equipment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per owner, pest control services the establishment once a week. Establishment must clean up rodent droppings and schedule pest control services. Inspector reviewed pest control reports. Please email inspector proof of pest control services. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

A knife was observed stored on an unclean surface (between wall and electrical outlet) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixers and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Inspector observed employee pouring milk in handwash sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (rolling equipment and pizza cuter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

(Dough ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout kitchen and basement). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
(various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen and walk in freezer ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (bakers racks, food storage shelves in the walk in cooler and kitchen, milk lowboy(interior)) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the sandwich prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the sandwich prep area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

(Dough ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Inspector observed dead rodent side of oven.PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in kitchen and basement ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Grease trap observed in poor repair. Grease was observed draining into a bucket. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The (ceilings ) in the (walk in cooler ) area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen and basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Various product was observed held at (44-46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product relocated to colder unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Soup was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
Walk in cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

The following physical observed in poor repair: 1.openings in floor throughout basement area. 2.opening observed outside of walk in cooler. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The ceilings in walk in cooler observed with dust and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
